prompts.name: Happy Smile
prompts.text: Give the subject a warm, genuine smile that feels cheerful, friendly, and naturally expressive.

prompts.name: Soft Blush
prompts.text: Add a gentle blush across the cheeks with a shy, sweet expression that feels soft and appealing.

prompts.name: Laughing
prompts.text: Use a bright laughing expression with joyful eyes and visible energy.

prompts.name: Surprised
prompts.text: Use a surprised expression with widened eyes and a slightly open mouth, while keeping the face attractive and readable.

prompts.name: Confident
prompts.text: Give the subject a confident expression with calm eye contact and a subtle assured smile.

prompts.name: Playful Smirk
prompts.text: Use a playful smirk that suggests teasing confidence and personality.

prompts.name: Determined
prompts.text: Use a determined expression with focused eyes, mild brow tension, and clear intent.

prompts.name: Sad
prompts.text: Use a soft sad expression with slightly watery eyes and restrained emotion.

prompts.name: Sleepy
prompts.text: Give the subject a sleepy, relaxed expression with heavy eyelids and a calm mood.

prompts.name: Wink
prompts.text: Use a playful wink with one eye closed and a light, charming expression.
